parameters.query:
SELECT
  COALESCE(MAX(date), NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days') AS last_sync,
  EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM COALESCE(MAX(date), NOW() - INTERVAL '90 days'))::BIGINT AS last_sync_ts
FROM etsy_transactions;

INSERT INTO etsy_transactions (
  transaction_id, order_id, type, description,
  amount, fee_amount, net_amount,
  currency, date, month
) VALUES (
  '{{$json.transaction_id}}',
  {{$json.order_id ? `'${$json.order_id}'` : 'NULL'}},
  '{{$json.type}}',
  {{$json.description ? `'${$json.description.replace(/'/g, "''")}'` : 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.amount    ?? 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.fee_amount ?? 'NULL'}},
  {{$json.net_amount ?? 'NULL'}},
  '{{$json.currency}}',
  '{{$json.date}}',
  '{{$json.month}}'
)
ON CONFLICT (transaction_id) DO NOTHING;
